last_run_window: Sat 4 Jul 2026 ~9:15am–3:00pm UTC / ~5:15pm–11:00pm MYT (post-Independence Day; markets closed; no material intraday changes; next catalyst Tue 14 Jul CPI, Aug 26 NVIDIA guidance)

stories.headline: June NFP miss (+57K) initially bullish for rate cuts, but Fed Chair Warsh signals inflation 'too high,' refuses July FOMC commitment, removes traditional guidance; July 28-29 FOMC viewed as open debate
Semiconductor recovery reverses: Micron -13%, SMH -5%, Intel -9%, AMD -7% on SK Hynix HBM slowdown, AI ROI skepticism, Warsh hawkishness; Friday's +5-10% Asia bounce fully erased
Grid capacity bottleneck: 30–50% of 2026 AI data-center capacity deferred to 2028 due to power interconnection queues and construction delays; electricity demand >1,000 TWh (double 2023)
SK Hynix cutting high-bandwidth memory production expansion; limits AI GPU training cluster capacity and constrains NVIDIA sales momentum
Apple and Intel reach foundry agreement; Intel to manufacture devices for Apple; Intel stock +15%, semiconductor sector +4.6% on deal day (capacity commitment validates foundry model)
Microsoft launches Frontier Company operating unit with ~6,000 engineers for AI co-design and enterprise deployment at scale; addresses adoption friction
Taiwan government tightens TSMC export rule to N-2 (two generations behind leading-edge) vs prior N-1; slows US TSMC onshoring and advanced chip capacity buildout
Alphabet raises FY2026 capex guidance to $180–190B (from prior range); signals management confidence in AI infrastructure ROI despite macro headwinds
Meta Q2 revenue guidance $58–61B; FY2026 capex raised to $125–145B citing higher component pricing and data-center costs; full-year expenses now $162–169B
Microsoft and Chevron sign 20-year power-supply agreement for data-center campus near Pecos, Texas; dedicated on-site generation removes power constraint on AI capex
Global data-center electricity demand now exceeds 1,000 TWh annually (double 2023 baseline); racks scaling from 30–40 kW to hundreds of kW, approaching 1+ megawatt ranges
Section 122 global 10% tariff set to expire mid-month (~July 24) unless Congress acts; creates uncertainty on tariff regime for China goods and semiconductor inputs
Trump administration restricts advanced AI chip shipments (H200) to Thailand and Malaysia citing China smuggling risk; enforces existing transshipment controls rather than new China escalation
